title: Swipe right, next screen
scenario: Verify that swiping right through the Quick Start Guide screens displays the correct content (second screen with two earbuds, third screen with charge case outside, fourth screen with charge case inside) matching Figma design.
steps: Swipe from the right side of the screen
Check that the screen shows the second screen with two earbuds
Swipe from the right side of the screen
Check that the screen shows the third screen with the charge case outside
Swipe from the right side of the screen
Check that the screen shows the fourth screen with the charge case inside
expected: All screens should match the Figma design.
